rules.title: Physical Devices and Systems Inventory
rules.description: Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried
rules.remediation: Create and maintain an inventory of all physical and virtual assets. Document system dependencies.

rules.title: Identity and Credential Management
rules.description: Identities and credentials are issued, managed, verified, revoked, and audited
rules.remediation: Implement identity and access management system. Use strong authentication and credential management practices.

rules.title: Data-at-rest Protection
rules.description: Data-at-rest is protected through encryption and other appropriate mechanisms
rules.remediation: Encrypt all sensitive data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent. Implement secure key management.

rules.title: Data-in-transit Protection
rules.description: Data-in-transit is protected through encryption and other appropriate mechanisms
rules.remediation: Use TLS 1.2+ for all network communications. Implement certificate pinning where appropriate.

rules.title: Event Data Aggregation and Correlation
rules.description: Event data are collected and correlated from multiple sources and sensors
rules.remediation: Implement centralized logging and monitoring. Use SIEM or log aggregation tools for correlation.

rules.title: Network Monitoring
rules.description: The network is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events
rules.remediation: Implement network and application monitoring. Set up alerts for anomalous behavior and security events.

rules.title: Incident Reporting
rules.description: Incidents are reported consistent with established criteria
rules.remediation: Create incident response plan. Document reporting procedures and escalation paths.

rules.title: Recovery Plan Execution
rules.description: Recovery plan is executed during or after a cybersecurity incident
rules.remediation: Develop and document recovery procedures. Implement automated backups and test restoration processes.
